title: AFI ScoredSignal v1 Projection (District 2 M1 DRAFT)
description: DRAFT / NON-IMPLEMENTATION thin canonical projection of a scored signal — deliberately NOT the full runtime ReactorScoredSignal. It carries identity, direction/risk/conviction, UWR score surface, and provenance links only. It structurally EXCLUDES runtime/storage baggage: no rawUss, no lenses[], no _priceFeedMetadata, no rawPayload, no debug fields, no MongoDB/storage fields, and no volatile processing timestamps (additionalProperties:false).
$comment: Timestamp policy (District 2 hash doctrine): volatile processing timestamps (scoredAt, createdAt, updatedAt, storedAt, processedAt, ingestedAt) are storage/runtime metadata — they are NOT canonical hash material by default and are NOT representable in this projection. The only canonical time field is the optional, domain-declared evaluatedAt, admissible only when supplied as deterministic/domain evidence.
x-afiPartOf: AFI District 2 — Canonical Data & Provenance Boundary (D2 M1)
x-afiDoctrineRefs: District Two M1 provenance-schema authorization — R1-GOV D-R1-5 (afi-config schema drafts and tests only; no runtime wiring)
District 2 hash doctrine — volatile processing timestamps are not canonical hash material; normalized evidence/domain timestamps are

x-afiOpenItems.SS-O1: riskBucket taxonomy — OPEN (scoring-doctrine-owned); free-form non-empty string in this draft.
x-afiOpenItems.SS-O2: uwrScore range/normalization policy — OPEN (scoring-doctrine-owned); unconstrained number in this draft.
x-afiOpenItems.SS-O3: uwrAxes axis-name registry — OPEN; free-form axis→number map in this draft.

schema.description: Schema version identifier for the ScoredSignal v1 projection.

signalId.description: Stable unique identifier of the scored signal (same id space as USS provenance.signalId).

providerId.description: OPTIONAL stable identifier of the originating signal provider.

providerRef.description: OPTIONAL free-form provider reference (handle, account ref), where appropriate.

analystId.description: Identifier of the analyst that scored the signal.

strategyId.description: Identifier of the strategy under which the signal was scored.

strategyVersion.description: OPTIONAL version of the strategy definition used for scoring.

direction.description: Signal direction (aligned with USS v1.1 facts.direction).

riskBucket.description: Risk bucket label for the scored signal. Bucket taxonomy is scoring-doctrine-owned and deliberately OPEN in this draft (SS-O1).

conviction.description: Analyst conviction in the signal, normalized to [0, 1].

uwrScore.description: Aggregate UWR score for the signal. Range/normalization policy is scoring-doctrine-owned and deliberately OPEN in this draft (SS-O2).

uwrAxes.description: Per-axis UWR score components as an axis-name → numeric-score map.

evaluatedAt.description: OPTIONAL domain-declared normalized evaluation time. Included ONLY when supplied as deterministic/domain evidence (e.g. derived from an evidence asOf or candle close) — NEVER generated from wall-clock runtime. Volatile processing timestamps (scoredAt etc.) are storage metadata and are not representable here.

provenanceRecordRef.description: Reference to the ProvenanceRecord v1 backing this scored signal. At least one of provenanceRecordRef or provenanceRecordHash is required.

provenanceRecordHash.description: CanonicalHash v1 link to the ProvenanceRecord v1 backing this scored signal. At least one of provenanceRecordRef or provenanceRecordHash is required.

outputHash.description: OPTIONAL CanonicalHash v1 of this projection's canonical serialization (scored-output domain).
